description_long: This house is a single-story, rectangular residential building with a flat roof and a modern, utilitarian design. The exterior features large, horizontally aligned windows and several entry points, suggesting multiple rooms and functional spaces. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or stucco, with some metal or glass elements visible in the window frames and railings. The layout is elongated, with a clear division between different sections of the house, possibly indicating separate living and utility areas. There are visible balconies or terraces on one side, providing outdoor access and additional living space. The overall appearance is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on practicality over ornamentation.
description: A modern, single-story rectangular house with a flat roof, large horizontal windows, and minimalist design. The structure features terraces and multiple entry points, emphasizing functionality.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with large windows and the primary entryway, highlighting the building's width and flat roof.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the elongated layout, visible terraces, and the arrangement of rooms along the length of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional windows, a secondary entry, and the continuation of the flat roof and minimalist exterior.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the depth of the house and the alignment of windows and doors along the side.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large horizontal windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, minimal steps, and no prominent porch or decorative elements
